statement: PTBCC obtains about three percentage points higher macro accuracy using less than 10% of the running time of confusion-matrix-based methods.
domain: All 11 datasets, CPU implementations, identical process/environment and published stopping rules.
runtime_contracts: sum(PTBCC dataset runtimes) / sum(FGBCC dataset runtimes) < 0.10
sum(PTBCC dataset runtimes) / sum(DS dataset runtimes) < 0.10
per-dataset ratios are reported separately and never replaced by a ratio of averages
verified_if: The claim holds under every plausible confusion-matrix denominator supported by the source.
falsified_if: It fails under every plausible denominator on a controlled faithful benchmark.
otherwise: BLOCKED because the paper does not name the denominator or publish raw timings.
